Description:
**NOTE**: Both host & clients require CD2 Update 17, MEV v5.4 & DEA b02.1
  **NOTE**: Only host requires NoGasSpitPraet.pak
  
  The 2nd version of DP. Inspired by ITGN & Celestial, now with newly added MEV, DEA enemies & stationaries as well as recolored enemies. 
  
  b09: 
  - Reduced Oppressor's movement speed from 1.5x to 1.25x in solo only
  - Reduced Cave Leech speed from 1.5x to 1.25x in solo only
  - Reduced the movement speed of Sewer & Hatch Rats from 1.25x & 1.5x to 1.15x & 1.35x respectively
Name: Death Penalty V2 [B09]
